name: Addtech AB
confidenceReason: Swedish serial acquirer with 18% EBITA CAGR since 2001. Zero dilution — uses only cash flow and debt. Better ROIC and growth profile than LIFCO-B.ST. Targets doubling earnings every 5 years.
bullCase: 20%+ TSR CAGR since 2001. Uses only cash flow and debt for acquisitions — zero dilution. Decentralized model preserves entrepreneurial culture. Strong acquisition pipeline. Energy transition is a secular tailwind.
bearCase: Premium valuation (~35x forward P/E) for a mid-single-digit organic grower. European macro headwinds could slow acquisition targets. Currency effects can drag reported growth.
